assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 8 output (remediation.md line 70) contains '[~accountid:557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id]' — the Jira @mention notation with the correct reporter account ID.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 1 (data-extraction.md line 23) extracts 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' from the Jira issue's reporter field. This same account ID is used in Step 8's @mention. No ProdSec configuration was required — the reporter was sourced from the Jira issue itself.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 3 output (affects-versions.md line 25) contains '[~accountid:557058:prodsec-mock-account-id]' — the Jira @mention notation with the correct ProdSec contact account ID.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ProdSec @mention '[~accountid:557058:prodsec-mock-account-id]' is on line 25, while the Comment Footnote 'This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/triage-security]...' is on line 28. The @mention precedes the footnote.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: The ProdSec account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' appears in the Step 3 output (affects-versions.md line 25) as '[~accountid:557058:prodsec-mock-account-id]', confirming successful extraction from Security Configuration (Step 0) and usage in the Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3).
